headline: The Evolving Earnings Picture Amid Elevated Oil Prices
summary: Uncertainty about oil prices due to the ongoing war is weighing on the market at present. But the associated spike in oil prices has done wonders for the Energy sector's earnings outlook.

headline: Watch Planes, Trains & Automobiles for Crisis Clues
summary: ​ Follow our live markets data and coverage.  The S&P 500 is down by 5.8% and U.S. retail gasoline prices are about a third higher since the Iran conflict began.  Executives of most major companies and the Wall Street analysts who cover them have been either mum or just mildly concerned about the economic fallout.

headline: FedEx Stock (FDX) after Q3 — Not Cheap, but the Bull Case Persists
summary: FedEx (FDX) stock no longer looks as obviously cheap, especially compared to 2025 levels, but in my opinion, that’s not the right way to view the story today. The Memphis-based company has been pleasantly surprising in terms of earnings power visibility, confirmed by its latest Q3 earnings report, which included a revised upward guidance. More disciplined capital allocation and margin expansion, driven by effective cost control, are translating into solid results. With the Freight spin-off now i

headline: CNBC Daily Open: 'Period of destruction' paused after Iran's 'present'

headline: A Look At FedEx (FDX) Valuation After Earnings Beat Guidance Hike And AI Efficiency Push
summary: Why FedEx’s latest quarter matters for investors FedEx (FDX) just delivered quarterly results that topped consensus earnings and revenue expectations, raised its full-year revenue growth outlook to 6.0% to 6.5%, and highlighted momentum from AI-driven efficiencies and new services like FedEx SameDay Local.
